articles.title: Japan space probe skims asteroid in test for planetary defense - Phys.org
articles.description: A Japanese space probe performed a flyby of a near-Earth asteroid on Sunday in a test mission for technology that could help protect the planet from space rocks.
articles.content:
A Japanese space probe performed a flyby of a near-Earth asteroid on Sunday in a test mission for technology that could help protect the planet from space rocks.

articles.title: NASA launched an emergency mission to stop the Swift Observatory from crashing to Earth - The Verge
articles.description: The joint mission by NASA and Katalyst Space Technologies to save the Swift Observatory came together in just nine months.
